tasks.title: Initialize Node.js/TypeScript Project Structure
tasks.description: Set up the foundational Node.js project with TypeScript configuration, ESLint, and required folder structure for the MCP server.
tasks.details:
1. Initialize npm project:
   ```bash
   npm init -y
   ```

2. Install core dependencies:
   ```bash
   npm install @modelcontextprotocol/sdk @sap-cloud-sdk/connectivity @sap-cloud-sdk/http-client @sap/xsenv @sap/xssec express zod winston dotenv
   npm install -D typescript @types/node @types/express ts-node nodemon
   ```

3. Create tsconfig.json:
   ```json
   {
     "compilerOptions": {
       "target": "ES2022",
       "module": "NodeNext",
       "moduleResolution": "NodeNext",
       "outDir": "./dist",
       "rootDir": "./src",
       "strict": true,
       "esModuleInterop": true,
       "skipLibCheck": true,
       "declaration": true
     },
     "include": ["src/**/*"],
     "exclude": ["node_modules", "dist"]
   }
   ```

4. Create folder structure:
   - src/
     - client/ (SAP HTTP client)
     - config/ (configuration management)
     - server/ (MCP server, Express)
     - tools/ (tool registry, definitions)
     - types/ (TypeScript interfaces)
     - utils/ (utilities)
     - index.ts (entry point)

5. Update package.json scripts:
   ```json
   {
     "type": "module",
     "scripts": {
       "build": "tsc",
       "start": "node dist/index.js",
       "dev": "nodemon --exec ts-node src/index.ts"
     }
   }
   ```
tasks.testStrategy:
1. Verify npm install completes without errors
2. Verify tsc compiles without errors
3. Verify folder structure matches specification
4. Test npm run dev starts without immediate crashes

tasks.title: Create MTA Deployment Descriptor
tasks.description: Create the mta.yaml file with all required BTP service bindings for Cloud Foundry deployment.
tasks.details:
1. Create mta.yaml:
   ```yaml
   _schema-version: '3.1'
   ID: cpi-mcp-server
   version: 1.0.0
   description: MCP Server for SAP Cloud Integration Administration

   modules:
     - name: cpi-mcp-server
       type: nodejs
       path: .
       parameters:
         memory: 256M
         disk-quota: 512M
         health-check-type: http
         health-check-http-endpoint: /health/live
       build-parameters:
         builder: npm
       requires:
         - name: cpi-mcp-destination
         - name: cpi-mcp-xsuaa
       provides:
         - name: cpi-mcp-server-api
           properties:
             url: ${default-url}

   resources:
     - name: cpi-mcp-destination
       type: org.cloudfoundry.managed-service
       parameters:
         service: destination
         service-plan: lite

     - name: cpi-mcp-xsuaa
       type: org.cloudfoundry.managed-service
       parameters:
         service: xsuaa
         service-plan: application
         path: ./xs-security.json
   ```

2. Create xs-security.json with scopes and role templates
tasks.testStrategy:
1. Validate mta.yaml with MTA Build Tool
2. Verify xs-security.json is valid JSON
3. Test mbt build succeeds
4. Verify service bindings are correct

tasks.title: Implement Tool Description Optimization for LLMs
tasks.description: Optimize tool descriptions with clear, concise language and examples for better LLM understanding.
tasks.details:
1. Review all tool definitions and improve descriptions:
   - Use active voice
   - Include common use cases
   - Add filter examples for list operations
   - Clarify parameter purposes

2. Example improvements:
   ```typescript
   description: 'List integration packages. Common filters: ' +
     "$filter=Name eq 'PackageName' or $filter=Mode eq 'EDIT_ALLOWED'. " +
     'Use $expand=IntegrationDesigntimeArtifacts to include artifacts.'
   ```

3. Add parameter-level descriptions with examples
tasks.testStrategy:
1. Test tools in Claude Desktop
2. Verify LLM selects correct tools
3. Validate parameter suggestions
